summary:
The evidence confirms a broad genetic contribution to neurodevelopmental disorders but fails to specifically address whether de novo mutations occur in regulatory elements. Without explicit discussion of regulatory region mutations or de novo events affecting non-coding genomic areas, no definitive causal link can be established based solely on the presented material.

\boxed{B}

\boxed{B}. Answer choice: B
